caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, grey pointed wig and glasses sits in a podcast studio setting. He wears a white collared shirt, a red and white patterned bowtie, and light-colored suspenders. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black microphone. Behind him is a wall filled with framed photographs and posters. The logo "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible as a red and white overlay on the left and right sides of the scene. Throughout the clip, the man remains in the same position, speaking with slight movements of his mouth and head, while the background and equipment remain stationary. The lighting is consistent across the frames, highlighting the texture of his wig and the details of his attire.
